query: South Korea political news late June early July 2026 affecting President Lee Jae-myung approval - prosecution reform, personnel appointments, local election ballot shortage backlash, economy
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on drivers of President Lee Jae-myung's approval decline heading into early July 2026:

## Bottom Line
Lee's approval is **46.5%** (disapproval 49.5%) per the June 29 Realmeter release — the **6th consecutive weekly decline** and **2nd straight week net-negative and below 50%**. Realmeter explicitly names four drivers, all of which are active in the late-June/early-July window:

**1. June 3 ballot-shortage scandal (most active driver):** 91 polling stations affected; ~25-day youth protests at Olympic Park; a converging wave of investigations — DPK declared a special-prosecutor push official policy (June 29), prosecutor-police probe ongoing, Board of Audit deploys 30 auditors in July, National Assembly committee meets in July (70 witnesses), whistleblower probe July 2. DPK and PPP are split on remedy (constitutional amendment vs. special prosecutor/re-election).

**2. Prosecution reform:** Base disillusionment over *delay* in abolishing prosecutors' supplementary-investigation powers — broadcaster Kim Eo-jun warned the "core base is leaving"; Yoo Si-min accused Lee of "subtraction politics," with intra-camp friction sharpening ahead of the August DPK leadership race.

**3. Personnel:** PM nominee Han Seong-sook's confirmation hit a four-property ownership controversy; Lee's own World Cup "nepotism in appointments" attack was turned against him by the opposition.

**4. Economy:** Won at ~1,545/USD (multi-year low), inflation above 3%, MSCI upgrade rejection (June 24), and a contentious second-supplementary-budget fight. The 800-trillion-won Samsung/SK Hynix semiconductor mega-project (June 29) is a double-edged factor — boosting DPK support in Honam/40s but generating a "Honam investment controversy" that itself drags on Lee's numbers.

**Trajectory (not a forecast):** A slow, steady ~0.2pp/week erosion, broadest in PK and among the progressive base/moderates, partly offset by semiconductor-driven gains in Honam. The live early-July variables are the ballot-shortage investigations, the PM confirmation, intra-camp tension before the August leadership election, the weak won, and the supplementary-budget battle.

The full report, structured key facts, 16 quantitative data points, and 19 cited sources have been recorded via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: Lee's approval rating remains below 50 pct for 2nd straight week: poll
sources.snippet: Lee's approval fell for six consecutive weeks to 46.5% as of June 29, 2026; disapproval 49.5%. Realmeter attributes decline to ballot mishandling, economic concerns, prosecution supplementary investigation dispute.

sources.title: 李대통령 지지율 46.5% 6주째↓...국힘 42%·민주 41% [리얼미터]
sources.snippet: Regional decline sharpest in Busan/Ulsan/Gyeongnam (-4.3pp to 43.2%); PPP 42% leads DPK 41% for third week.

sources.title: 李在明施政支持率跌至46.5％ 連2週低於50％
sources.snippet: Progressives' support fell 4.5pp to 75.9%, moderates -2.5pp to 45.3%; sixth consecutive decline.

sources.title: 시민단체, '李정부 코어 지지층 이탈' 주장한 방송인 김어준 고발
sources.snippet: Kim Eo-jun reported for defamation after claiming Lee's core support base is collapsing, citing prosecution-reform delays.

sources.title: 대통령 흔드는 여권 스피커, 뺄셈 정치만 할 텐가
sources.snippet: Yoo Si-min accuses Lee of 'subtraction politics' alienating the base over prosecution supplementary-investigation abolition; tensions ahead of August DPK leadership election.

sources.title: 민주당 '투표용지 부족 사태, 특검 당론 추진하겠다'
sources.snippet: DPK floor leader Han Byung-do announces special-prosecutor probe into ballot shortage as party policy; proposes NEC dissolution/reform.

sources.title: 투표용지 부족 수사 속도... 합수본, 선관위 '외유성 출장'도 착수
sources.snippet: Joint Investigation HQ questions Songpa NEC officials; 91 polling stations had shortages (42 Seoul, 23 Gyeonggi, 11 Incheon); whistleblower probe July 2.

sources.title: 무뎌진 선거 신뢰, 감사원이 답해야 한다
sources.snippet: Board of Audit to deploy 30 auditors for July NEC inspection; details NEC overseas-trip spending scandal.

sources.title: '투표용지 국조' 속도...선관위 개혁 개헌 관건
sources.snippet: National Assembly special committee second meeting in July with 70 witnesses; DPK wants constitutional amendment, PPP wants special prosecutor; NEC acting chair Wi Cheol-hwan faces impeachment threat.

sources.title: AI 과실, 골목상권과 노동자로 연결시킬 것...청문회 마친 한성숙의 다짐
sources.snippet: PM nominee Han Seong-sook's June 25-26 hearing marred by four-property ownership controversy; PPP demands withdrawal; DPK to adopt report June 29.

sources.title: Lee, outgoing PM hold what could be last weekly meeting before Kim leaves office
sources.snippet: PM Kim Min-seok stepping down to run for DPK leadership; Lee nominated Han Seong-sook as successor.

sources.title: 이 대통령 '홍명보 무능지휘관' 언급에...장동혁 '거울보며 할 말'
sources.snippet: PPP leader Jang Dong-hyuk calls Lee the cause of economic crisis; cites exchange rate above 1,540 won and inflation above 3%; opposes supplementary budget.

sources.title: South Korean Won Falls to Over 3-Week Low | Forex News 2026.06.29
sources.snippet: Won fell to ~1,545/USD on June 29 amid Middle East tensions; investors watching Lee's semiconductor/AI investment announcement.

sources.title: MSCI 선진국지수 편입 불발... 원·달러 환율 어떻게 움직일 것인가?
sources.snippet: MSCI declined June 24 to upgrade South Korea to developed-market status; won above 1,500 despite Q1 growth 1.7%; foreign outflows >130 trillion won.

sources.title: South Korea unveils massive AI and chip investment drive
sources.snippet: Lee announces semiconductor/AI mega-investment June 29; Gwangju/South Jeolla 520 trillion won cluster; total could exceed 1,000 trillion won; rate $1=1,544.38 won.

sources.title: 장동혁 '세금 쓰는 것 밖에 모르는 정권...추경으로 지지율 올리려 하나'
sources.snippet: PPP attacks Lee's proposed second supplementary budget for AI GPUs as approval-boosting cash-sprinkling; eggs over 10,000 won/carton; DPK defends as necessary fiscal response.

sources.title: '돼지 눈엔 돼지만 보여'...'돼지'는 누구?
sources.snippet: Lee's combative social-media posts on Honam investment (10 posts over weekend) spark controversy; PPP alleges state intervention in factory siting.

sources.title: 李在明痛批韩国足协：荒唐
sources.snippet: Lee criticizes Korea Football Association over World Cup exit, calling Hong Myung-bo appointment 'absurd' and emphasizing appointment decisions; Hong resigned June 28.

data_points.metric: Polling stations nationwide with ballot shortages (June 3 election)
Planned semiconductor fab investment in Gwangju-South Jeolla
Board of Audit auditors deployed to NEC inspection
